Expense ratio 0.8% Benchmark BSE 250 SmallCap TR INR AUM ₹33724 Cr Inception Date 1 January, 2013 Min Lumpsum/SIP ₹100/₹100 Exit Load 1.0% Lock In No Lock-in TurnOver 11.71% Risk Very High Risk About HDFC Small Cap Fund HDFC Small Cap Fund is a small-cap mutual fund . As per SEBI’s classification, small-cap funds are required to invest at least 65% of their assets in small-cap companies, those ranked 251st and below by market capitalization. The fund uses the BSE 250 Small Cap TRI as its benchmark, which helps measure its performance against a broad universe of similar small-cap stocks . The fund has a strong presence in sectors like Healthcare, Technology, Financials, Automobiles, and Infrastructure. India offers a wide and fast-growing base of small-cap companies, which the fund house believes can deliver strong long-term returns. HDFC Small Cap Mutual Fund focuses on selecting fundamentally sound businesses with reasonable valuations, aiming to generate alpha while managing risk effectively. INDmoney makes it simple to invest in the HDFC Small Cap Fund. To do so, follow the steps below: Download the INDmoney app. Search for ‘HDFC Small Cap Fund’. Select whether you want to invest in SIP or lump sum. Enter the amount you wish to invest. Set up payments via bank mandate or UPI. What is the current NAV of HDFC Small Cap Fund? The NAV of the fund today is ₹152.70. NAV or Net Asset Value is the per unit price of a mutual fund. For example, if the NAV of a fund is ₹10, it means you can get 1000 units of that mutual fund at ₹10,000. What is the return on the fund? HDFC Small Cap Fund fund has generated a return of 9.70% in 1 year, 18.98% in 3 years, 20.93% in 5 years. Who is the fund manager of HDFC Small Cap Fund? The fund managers are Chirag Setalvad, Dhruv Muchhal. What is the exit load of the fund? The exit load is 1% if redeemed in 0-1 Years. Exit load is a fee levied for ‘exiting’ the fund earlier than a stipulated period, usually 1 year. What is the expense ratio of the fund? The expense ratio is 0.80%. The Expense Ratio is a fee charged for managing the fund. This includes commissions, administrative costs etc. What is the AUM of the fund? The AUM of the fund is ₹33724 Cr. AUM stands for Assets Under Management. It refers to the total assets managed by the fund. What are the top holdings of HDFC Small Cap Fund? The top 3 holdings of the fund are Aster DM Healthcare Ltd Ordinary Shares(4.78%), Bank of Baroda(3.44%), Firstsource Solutions Ltd(3.42%) Invest Now
